sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Soybeans fermented with Bacillus spp. (solely or together with other microorganisms), that normally retain the shape of soybeans and are not a type of paste, although some of the soybeans may be crushed during the manufacturing process. The final  products may be sticky and can be further processed into various forms of products.

sections.title: Natto
sections.text: Soybeans (including crushed soybeans,  hereinafter referred to as soybeans) are soaked in water or diluted salty water, then steamed and fermented with Bacillus subtilis var. Natto. No material or ingredients shall be added after fermentation. Natto shall be sticky and filamentous, substance must be visible when a bean in Natto is picked up.

sections.title: Cheonggukjang
sections.text: Soybeans soaked in water are boiled, steamed or baked and then fermented with naturally-occurring or cultivated microorganisms (i.e.  Bacillus spp. including Bacillus subtilis) for a few days. Optional ingredients described in Section 3.1.2.2, may be added only after fermentation. The final product, Cheonggukjang, which complies with the component requirement may be presented in the forms of powder, paste and spherical pellet.

sections.title: Thua Nao
sections.text: Soybeans are soaked in water, steamed or boiled, and wrapped in broad leaves such as banana leave. They are fermented with Bacillus spp. (solely or may contain other microorganisms). Optional ingredients described in Section 3.1.2.3, may be presented/added. The final product, Thua Nao, which complies with the component requirement may be presented in paste or dried forms, e.g. powder, sheet, and pellet.

sections.title: HYGIENE
sections.text: It is recommended that the products covered by the provisions of this standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CXC 1-1969), and other relevant Codex texts, such as codes of hygienic practice and codes of practice. The products should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria Related to Foods (CXG 21-1997).

pages.title: REGIONAL STANDARD FOR SOYBEAN PRODUCTS FERMENTED WITH BACILLUS SPECIES
pages.summary: Página 1 contém o título principal do documento e cabeçalho. Não há seções ou texto interno para mapear nesta página.
Página apresenta seções bem estruturadas com títulos numéricos claros. As seções 1 a 3 com múltiplos níveis e textos associados. Algumas subseções da seção 3 continuam na próxima página.

Página 3 contém seções estruturadas numeradas de 3.1.2.3 até 7.1, com textos associados. O título 3.1.2.3 é continuação da página anterior. Não há seção claramente continuando para a próxima página. Cabeçalho da página é CXS 354R-2023  3.

A página 4 contém seções numeradas de nível 1 (7.2, 8, 9) e subseções de nível 2 (8.1, 8.2) com seus respectivos textos. Não há continuidade de seções da página anterior nem continuidade para próxima página. Cabeçalho da página é 'CXS 354R-2023  4'.
